def case_perms(word, max_perms=16):
    """Generate up to max_perms case permutations."""
    perms = set()
    perms.add(word.lower())
    perms.add(word.upper())
    for _ in range(max_perms):
        v = ''.join(c.upper() if random.random() > 0.5 else c.lower() for c in word)
        perms.add(v)
    return list(perms)[:max_perms]
